name: Salsa, Strawberry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 whole red bell pepper, stemmed and seeded
1/2 whole yellow bell pepper, stemmed and seeded
1/2 whole green pepper, stemmed and seeded
1/2 pint fresh strawberries, hulled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients in a large mixing bowl.
2. Toss gently to combine until evenly distributed.
3. Cover tightly with plastic wrap or transfer to an airtight container.
4. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, up to 4 hours for optimal flavor development.
5. Fifteen minutes before serving, remove the salsa from the refrigerator.
6. Allow it to sit at room temperature until some of its chill is lost for a more vibrant taste.
Yield: approximately 2 1/2 cups
